name: The Overwhelmed Finance Lead
description: Heads finance at a 50-200 person company. Owns the monthly close and quarterly board reporting. Already drowning in spreadsheets and feels every new system makes it worse before it gets better.

name: The Data-Hungry Operator
description: Operations or RevOps lead who needs cross-tool data daily and is constantly building one-off dashboards in Looker or Mode. Wants a single source of truth they can trust.
